description: 金融服务行业扩展 ontology，覆盖银行、保险、资产管理、支付等金融业务领域的核心概念、产品、流程、风险与合规
description_en: Financial Services industry extension covering banking, insurance, asset management, payments — core concepts, products, processes, risk and compliance

classes.definition: 持有牌照的金融服务提供主体，如银行、保险公司、券商、基金公司等
classes.definition_en: A licensed entity providing financial services, e.g., banks, insurers, brokerages, fund managers

classes.definition: 银行按地理区域设立的分支网点，提供线下金融服务
classes.definition_en: A geographically distributed branch providing in-person banking services

classes.definition: 按业务类型划分的经营单元，如零售银行、公司银行、投资银行、财富管理等
classes.definition_en: An operational unit organized by business type, e.g., retail banking, corporate banking, investment banking, wealth management

classes.definition: 金融机构设计和销售的标准化或定制化产品，如存款、贷款、基金、保单等
classes.definition_en: Standardized or customized products designed and sold by financial institutions, e.g., deposits, loans, funds, insurance policies

classes.definition: 向个人或企业发放信贷的产品，含住房贷款、消费贷、经营贷等
classes.definition_en: Credit products issued to individuals or corporations, including mortgages, consumer loans, and business loans

classes.definition: 保险公司承保的风险转移产品，含寿险、财险、健康险、责任险等
classes.definition_en: Risk transfer products underwritten by insurers, including life, property, health, and liability insurance

classes.definition: 集合投资者资金进行组合投资的产品，含公募基金、私募基金、ETF等
classes.definition_en: Pooled investment vehicles including mutual funds, private equity funds, and ETFs

classes.definition: 金融机构为客户开立的账户，记录资金、持仓和交易历史
classes.definition_en: An account opened for a customer, recording balances, holdings, and transaction history

classes.definition: 资金或金融资产的转移事件，含存取款、转账、支付、证券买卖等
classes.definition_en: A transfer event of funds or financial assets, including deposits, transfers, payments, securities trades

classes.definition: 投保人向保险公司提出的损失赔偿请求
classes.definition_en: A request for loss compensation filed by a policyholder to an insurer

classes.definition: 由多种金融资产组成的投资组合，按风险偏好和投资策略配置
classes.definition_en: A collection of financial assets allocated according to risk appetite and investment strategy

classes.definition: 基于客户信用历史计算的风险评估分值
classes.definition_en: A risk assessment score calculated from a customer's credit history

classes.definition: 金融机构按监管要求定期提交的合规报告，如资本充足率报告、反洗钱报告等
classes.definition_en: Compliance reports submitted periodically to regulators, e.g., capital adequacy, AML reports

classes.definition: 负责维护客户关系和产品销售的一线业务角色
classes.definition_en: A front-line role responsible for customer relationship management and product sales

classes.definition: 负责信用风险、市场风险和操作风险评估的专业角色
classes.definition_en: A professional role assessing credit, market, and operational risks

classes.definition: 负责确保机构运营符合法律法规和内部政策的治理角色
classes.definition_en: A governance role ensuring institutional operations comply with laws, regulations, and internal policies

classes.definition: 评估和审批保险投保申请或贷款申请的风控角色
classes.definition_en: A risk control role evaluating and approving insurance or loan applications

classes.definition: 借款人或交易对手无法履行合约义务导致的损失风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of loss due to a borrower's or counterparty's failure to meet contractual obligations

classes.definition: 因利率、汇率、股价、商品价格等市场因素波动导致的损失风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of loss due to fluctuations in interest rates, exchange rates, equity prices, or commodity prices

classes.definition: 因内部流程、人员、系统缺陷或外部事件导致的损失风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of loss due to inadequate internal processes, people, systems, or external events

classes.definition: 防范洗钱和恐怖融资的合规政策体系
classes.definition_en: Compliance policy framework for preventing money laundering and terrorism financing

classes.definition: 开户前和持续进行的客户身份验证和风险评估流程
classes.definition_en: Pre-onboarding and ongoing customer identity verification and risk assessment process

classes.definition: 评估风险并决定是否承保或放贷的审批流程
classes.definition_en: Risk evaluation and approval process for insurance or lending decisions

classes.definition: 从报案、查勘、定损到赔付的端到端理赔处理流程
classes.definition_en: End-to-end claims handling from filing, investigation, assessment to settlement

classes.definition: 识别、评估、监控和缓释各类金融风险的组织能力
classes.definition_en: Organizational capability to identify, assess, monitor, and mitigate financial risks

classes.definition: 处理存贷款、账户管理和支付结算的核心业务系统
classes.definition_en: Core business system processing deposits, loans, account management, and payment settlements

classes.definition: 执行证券、外汇、衍生品等金融资产交易的电子平台
classes.definition_en: Electronic platform for executing trades in securities, FX, derivatives, and other financial assets

classes.definition: 不良贷款余额占总贷款余额的比率
classes.definition_en: Ratio of non-performing loans to total loan balance

classes.definition: 保险公司赔付率与费用率之和，衡量承保盈利能力
classes.definition_en: Sum of loss ratio and expense ratio, measuring underwriting profitability

classes.definition: 银行资本与风险加权资产的比率，衡量抗风险能力
classes.definition_en: Ratio of bank capital to risk-weighted assets, measuring risk resilience

relations.definition: 金融机构设有业务条线
relations.definition_en: A financial institution has business lines

relations.definition: 金融机构设有分支网点
金融机构提供金融产品
relations.definition_en: A financial institution offers financial products

relations.definition: 客户账户持有金融产品
relations.definition_en: A customer account holds financial products

relations.definition: 客户账户通过信用评分评估
relations.definition_en: A customer account is assessed by a credit score

relations.definition: 金融产品经核保流程审批
relations.definition_en: A financial product is approved through the underwriting process
An insurance policy triggers a claim

relations.definition: 投资基金在组合中管理
relations.definition_en: An investment fund is managed within a portfolio

relations.definition: 金融机构向监管机构提交报告
relations.definition_en: A financial institution submits reports to regulators

relations.definition: 客户尽调流程遵循反洗钱政策
relations.definition_en: KYC process complies with AML policy

relations.definition: 交易在核心银行系统中处理
relations.definition_en: A transaction is processed on the core banking system

relations.definition: 投资产品在交易平台上交易
relations.definition_en: Investment products are traded on the trading platform
